author: codex
scope: Codex-only validator/rule-or-data triage for the next current unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape bucket after relation056; deterministic inspection only; no provider-backed commands, generated-output commands, durable data edits, code edits, LOG edits, manifest edits, submissions edits, retired.json edits, canonical edits, or wiki edits

current_count_if_observed.method: Read-only SQLite inventory over data/canonical.db using the endpoint shape table currently present in packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts.
current_count_if_observed.relation056_state: LOG.md and data/review_notes/codex-canonical-cleanup-2026-06-21.jsonl record relation056 as applied for sub_cc4afbb3972f607e with expected unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape=9. Local read-only endpoint inventory also returns nine shaped relation issues.

bucket.name: has_timeline_event project->entity
bucket.validator_expectation: Current has_timeline_event allows project|route|corridor|entity|source|event -> event. It should not be widened to allow project -> entity.

recommendation.recommended_action: Retire the malformed has_timeline_event project -> entity submission and add one valid has_claim project -> claim replacement that links the F/M Swap Service Change project to the existing Patrick Scalise F/M swap outreach claim.
recommendation.why_data_cleanup: The cited source text describes Patrick Scalise's role in planning, implementing, and communicating the F/M swap service change. Patrick Scalise is not a timeline event, and the same source already has an accepted claim record that captures the role/outreach assertion with the same evidence.
recommendation.why_not_validator_code_gap: A timeline relation's object endpoint should remain an event. Allowing has_timeline_event project -> entity would blur participant, implementer, and claim-support semantics and would hide an endpoint selection error. The proposed replacement uses an already-accepted endpoint shape, has_claim project -> claim.

bad_submission_ids.retire_reason: Malformed timeline relation: object endpoint is Patrick Scalise as an entity/person, while the cited evidence supports a claim about his F/M swap planning, implementation, and outreach role rather than an event endpoint.

proposed_replacement.suggested_label: F/M swap service change has Patrick Scalise outreach claim
proposed_replacement.suggested_description: The F/M swap service change has a source-backed claim that Patrick Scalise played a central role in planning, implementing, communicating, and supporting rider outreach for the change.

source_blocks.summary: Patrick Scalise played a central role in planning, implementing, and communicating the F/M swap service change, including stakeholder presentations.
source_blocks.short_quote: Patrick has played a central role in planning, implementing, and communicating the F/M swap service change

source_blocks.summary: Patrick Scalise collaborated with Subways and Customer Communications and organized more than 400 customer ambassador shifts around implementation.
source_blocks.short_quote: organizing and executing a large-scale customer outreach effort of more than 400 customer ambassador shifts

related_existing_valid_coverage.note: Derived relation already covers Patrick Scalise's Operations Planning affiliation; it does not replace the project/claim association.

collision_and_prior_work_checks.prior_review_note_hits_for_selected_rela: No prior prep artifact found selecting sub_79410d5bbfe08442 for cleanup.

expected_delta.caveat: Assumes no other concurrent relation endpoint-shape work lands before conductor applies this cleanup.

data_cleanup_steps: Retire submission sub_79410d5bbfe08442 with a reason tying the malformed has_timeline_event project -> entity row to this prep artifact.

Append one accepted replacement relation submission for meeting_doc_194171 using relation_kind has_claim, subject_local_observation_id project_meeting_doc_194171_fm_swap, and object_local_observation_id claim_meeting_doc_194171_fm_swap_outreach.
Reuse meeting_doc_194171#p015_c0005 and meeting_doc_194171#p015_c0006 as evidence.
Run only the conductor-owned materialize/validate lane after applying, outside this bounded prep task.

code_patch_plan.reason: No validator patch is recommended. Keep has_timeline_event object endpoints constrained to event; use the existing has_claim project -> claim shape for this fact.

commands_run_read_only: pwd && rg -n 'unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape|endpoint_shape|relation056|endpoint' packages data/review_notes data/canonical/relations.jsonl | head -200
sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db 'pragma table_info(relations); pragma table_info(records); pragma table_info(record_submissions); pragma table_info(evidence_refs);'
rg targeted searches for the nine user-listed remaining relation record ids in data/canonical/relations.jsonl, data/submissions, data/review_notes, and retired.json
sqlite3 targeted query for the nine user-listed relation ids with endpoint record kinds and submissions
rg targeted searches for the nine selected submission ids in data/submissions and retired.json
sqlite3 read-only endpoint-shape bucket inventory using the current RELATION_ENDPOINT_SHAPES semantics
sqlite3 read-only same-source record and relation inspection for meeting_doc_194171
jq read-only source block inspection for raw/sources/meeting_doc_194171/blocks.jsonl page 15 and p003_c0004
rg targeted searches for sub_79410d5bbfe08442 and candidate replacement endpoints
